allow: PowerShell(cd "C:\\Users\\Admin\\Desktop\\infinitflowai"; $job = Start-Job { cd "C:\\Users\\Admin\\Desktop\\infinitflowai"; npm run dev 2>&1 }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 15; Receive-Job $job; Stop-Job $job; Remove-Job $job)

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3001" -TimeoutSec 10 -UseBasicParsing; "HOME: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { "HOME ERROR: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" }; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3001/contact" -TimeoutSec 10 -UseBasicParsing; "CONTACT: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { "CONTACT ERROR: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" }; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3001/servicii" -TimeoutSec 10 -UseBasicParsing; "SERVICII: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { "SERVICII ERROR: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell(@\("http://localhost:3000", "http://localhost:3000/contact", "http://localhost:3000/despre-noi", "http://localhost:3000/servicii", "http://localhost:3000/cum-functioneaza"\) | ForEach-Object { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $_ -TimeoutSec 8 -UseBasicParsing; "$_`: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { "$_`: EROARE - $\($_.Exception.Message.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(80,$_.Exception.Message.Length\)\)\)" } })
